args: cd ~/materials && git pull --rebase origin main 2>&1 || echo 'git pull 실패'; CMEM=~/.claude/projects/-home-jaegwan97-materials/memory; if [ -d memory ] && [ "$(ls -A memory 2>/dev/null)" ]; then mkdir -p "$CMEM" && cp -a memory/* "$CMEM"/; fi
hooks.statusMessage: 최신 설정 및 메모리 동기화 중...

args: CMEM=~/.claude/projects/-home-jaegwan97-materials/memory; cd ~/materials && if [ -d "$CMEM" ] && [ "$(ls -A "$CMEM" 2>/dev/null)" ]; then mkdir -p memory && cp -a "$CMEM"/* memory/; fi; if [ -n "$(git status --porcelain)" ]; then git add -A && git commit -m 'Auto-sync: Claude Code session' && git push origin main 2>&1; fi
